Home → Discography → Back with the Thugz Vol. 2

Back with the Thugz Vol. 2

2009 · Hi Power Entertainment

The direct follow-up to Back with the Thugz from just four months earlier. Bizzy had recorded enough material for two albums. Widely considered the stronger of the two volumes, with better production and more focused performances. Produced by Seriouss Sam, Makavelik, and Nu-Ration, though the album packaging does not credit producers for individual tracks.

"Lets go through the worm hole, and I stand, as if sand, I demand much respect, David, God has a plan."

— I Demand Much Respect
